title: Change my personal details
applicationTitle: I want to change my personal details
applicationTitleRep: The claimant wants to change their personal details
genericGuidanceRep: Upload letters, photos or documents if they are relevant to the claimant’s application. Do not upload any other material.
contactApplicationTextRep: Give details of the claimant’s application in the text box or upload a file

content.text: Use this form to apply to change the personal details you gave when making your claim.
If you change your postal or email address, we’ll send any letters to the new address.
If you change your telephone number, we’ll contact you using the new number if we have questions about your claim.
Details you can apply to change:

contentRep.text: Use this form to apply to change the personal details the claimant gave when making their claim.
If the claimant changes their postal or email address, we’ll send any letters to the new address if they become unrepresented.
If they change their telephone number, we’ll contact them using the new number if they become unrepresented.
Details the claimant can apply to change:
